>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/dns-lookup/spf/lookup-result"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get SPF record lookup result for a domain

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"maxAgeMs":{"type":"number","example":5000,"description":"The maximum age of the cache in milliseconds [0]-fetch dns, [-1]-from cache"},"domain":{"type":"string","example":"example.com"}},"required":["domain"],"title":"SpfRecordLookupResultRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"recordDomainName":{"type":"string","example":"example.com"},"records":{"example":["v=SPF1 include:_spf.example.com ~all"],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["recordDomainName","records"],"title":"SpfRecordLookupResult"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"422":{"description":"Unprocessable Entity"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
